name: ASRock B650 STEEL LEGEND WiFi ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - 802.11axe WiFi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASRock B650 STEEL LEGEND WiFi ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Full-ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with PCIe 5.0, high DDR5 support, and WiFi 6E for gaming.
